GHOSTWRITR Outline turns the locked Book Pitch into a meaningful section, chapter, and paragraph architecture. Phase 1 and 2 use Sonnet; Phase 3 verifies and assembles with Haiku. Book: Systems of Influence Outline stage: COMMITTED Book Pitch: LOCKED INPUT Book Setup Promise Outline Base Story Research External Stories Personal Stories Chapter Draft Editing STAGE WORKSPACE Outline Review the complete table of contents package before Base Story begins. Research stays manual. Back to Promise Open Dashboard Back to Phase 2 Generate Table of Contents Commit Outline Outline Document Progress 3 of 3 phases approved 100% ✅ Phase 1 · Sections & Chapters ✅ Phase 2 · Chapter Breakdowns ✅ Phase 3 · Full ToC 🛠️ Generate this phase first Once this phase has content, you can review it, approve it, and move forward. Phase 3 · Full ToC The locked Book Pitch and Promise work remain the governing blueprint. Promise Statement This book gives leaders a clear system for building trust, alignment, ownership, and accountability at scale. Book Pitch Anchor Title: Target words: 42,000 Not available yet. Generate the Table of Contents to assemble and verify the locked Outline and Chapter Breakdowns. Phase 3 Approval Review the final Table of Contents, then approve it. Generate this phase first, then approve it once you've reviewed the output. Approve Phase AI Chat Phase 3 is a validation and assembly pass. Use chat to reassemble the ToC or to diagnose whether requested changes belong back in Phase 1 or Phase 2. Start a conversation with this phase. Ask for changes, clarification, or a fresh pass. Send to AI What Commits in Phase 3 The full section > chapter > paragraph ToC package. The final locked outline blueprint for Base Story. The approved structure that downstream story and research work will use. Next Stage Once you commit the full ToC, Base Story begins. GHOSTWRITR Chapter-by-chapter ghostwriting workspace that synthesizes the committed promise, outline, base story, research, external stories, and personal stories. Book: Systems of Influence Chapter Draft: COMMITTED Book Setup Promise Outline Base Story Research External Stories Personal Stories Chapter Draft Editing STAGE WORKSPACE Chapter Draft The author agent drafts each chapter from the full upstream artifact stack. The reviewer agent critiques it for craft, clarity, and AI tells before the draft lands here for your review. The normal flow is one chapter at a time. Open Publish Regenerate This Chapter Commit Chapter Expand Toward Target Generate All Chapters Expand Under-Target Chapters Repair Weak Chapters Use Generate This Chapter to work chapter by chapter. After you review it, use Next Chapter to move forward. Use Generate All Chapters only when you want the full manuscript pipeline to run in the background. Use Expand Toward Target when the selected chapter is materially short on finished prose. 2 drafted chapters currently need repair. Manuscript Progress Counted from the actual saved draft text, not the target prompt.
